---
title: "NASIS 2020 - NASIS Query and Report Writing"
subtitle: "Course Content"
author:
  - name: Soil and Plant Science Division Staff
    affiliation:
    - USDA-NRCS
format: html
date: today
title-block-banner: "#19567B"
---

## Browse Course Content

##### 0. [Pre-Course Assignment](https://ncss-tech.github.io/nasis_training/content/pre-course2020.html)

##### 1. [Writing Queries](https://ncss-tech.github.io/nasis_training/content/queries.html)
##### 2. [Simple Reports](https://ncss-tech.github.io/nasis_training/content/sreports.html)
##### 3. [Calculations, Validations and Beyond](https://ncss-tech.github.io/nasis_training/content/cvbeyond.html)
##### 4. [Report Outputs](https://ncss-tech.github.io/nasis_training/content/reportout.html)
##### 5. [Data Manipulation](https://ncss-tech.github.io/nasis_training/content/datam.html)
##### 6. [HTML Reports](https://ncss-tech.github.io/nasis_training/content/rpthtml.html)
##### 7. [Final Project](https://ncss-tech.github.io/nasis_training/content/final.html)
